scenario.diagnosticOnly: entryTimingRiskScore and adjustedAction preview, no recommendation impact
scenario.activeGuard: HIGH risk BUY/STRONG_BUY/WATCH/HOLD rows are separated as WAIT_PULLBACK/CAUTION candidates for replay only

activationReason: The replay is favorable, but v1 keeps the guard as a diagnostic preview until the HIGH risk group is tracked out of sample. No live recommendation action is changed in this patch.
overfitControls: action downgrade preview is separated from live recommendation action
